## Features

- Includes the theme colorway picker release: 8 dark themes, 16 light themes, 8 light-panel light variants, and 8 dark-panel light variants.
- Organizes the theme picker into 8 colorway rows so each row contains the matching dark theme, light-theme-with-light-panel variant, and light-theme-with-dark-panel variant.
- Adds the new light themes Glacier, Ivory, Apricot, Lilac, Canopy, Ledger, Terracotta, and Lagoon.
- Keeps follow-system theme selection active while allowing the current system family to choose from all valid variants; light system mode can choose either light-panel or dark-panel light themes.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixes release E2E stability by waiting for renderer reload and active workspace restoration before switching recent workspaces.
- Raises the E2E build hook timeout so slower production renderer builds do not fail before the desktop tests can start.
- Removes flaky E2E dependency on the transient `Unsaved changes` indicator and verifies auto-save through persisted file contents instead.
- Adjusts the theme colorway data so each row shares the same visual color family instead of only sharing metadata.
- Removes the table-style header from the theme picker so the dialog shows only colorway rows and theme buttons.
- Aligns Neutral and Warm colorway accents and swatches across their dark, light-panel, and dark-panel variants.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Updates `package.json` and `package-lock.json` to version `1.2.11`.
- Supersedes the failed remote `v1.2.9` release workflow. The `v1.2.9` tag was not rewritten.
- Leaves the local-only `v1.2.10` attempt unpublished and uses a fresh release tag for this version.
- Updates the multi-theme requirements document to describe the 16 light themes, 8 light-panel variants, 8 dark-panel variants, colorway row layout, and headerless picker.
- Adds unit coverage for complete colorway rows and same-family accent consistency.
- Updates shell and E2E coverage for the headerless theme picker layout and stable release validation.

## Verification

- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts -g "edits and auto-saves markdown"`
- `npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts -g "renders Mermaid flowcharts|remembers and switches recent workspaces"`
- `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- macOS Apple Silicon: `MDE-1.2.11-mac-arm64.dmg`, `MDE-1.2.11-mac-arm64.zip`
- macOS Intel: `MDE-1.2.11-mac-x64.dmg`, `MDE-1.2.11-mac-x64.zip`
- Windows x64: `MDE-1.2.11-win-x64.exe`, `MDE-1.2.11-win-x64.exe.blockmap`, `latest.yml`
